mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_calendar WHERE year = #{year} ORDER BY calendar_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_calendar (calendar_date, day_type, name, year, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{calendarDate}, #{dayType}, #{name}, #{year}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO work_calendar (calendar_date, day_type, name, year, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.calendarDate}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.name}, #{item.year}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE day_type = VALUES(day_type), name = VALUES(name), update_time = NOW()
